markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and brainstorm new SEO growth opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Competitor Content:** The new draft's tone is better, but the narrative is repetitive (e.g., overusing the 97% runtime stat). Jackson will provide new PMM assets to support a broader set of Galileo selling points.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [**Performance:** Sessions are growing monthly, and all content clusters improved in rank. The "Observability" cluster is gaining traction but remains outside the top 10.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [**New SEO Tactics:** Key ideas include repurposing content for video (Notebook LM), creating a research hub, and adding "pre-prepared prompt" footer links for LLMs (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude) to guide AI-driven summaries.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**Content Promotion:** The "Mastering Multi-Agent Systems" ebook, a high-performing asset, will be promoted more aggressively by replacing existing CTAs on pillar pages and blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=2013.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Review

  - [**Production Status:** 7 articles on track for delivery this week.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Traffic:** Monthly sessions are growing. A recent dip from last week's high is attributed to Google removing bot traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [**Rankings:** All content clusters improved in position.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)
      - [**Note:** Looker reports position *increases* (e.g., 10 → 9) as negative deltas due to a mathematical calculation error.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)
      - [**Observability:** Gaining traction with new keywords but is still outside the top 10.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
      - [**Evaluation:** Remains the top performer.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [**LLM Visibility:** Traffic increased last week, though not to an all-time high.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
      - [**Scrunch:** Galileo is a top-5 performer in key categories (Reliability, Governance, Safety, Model Debugging).](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)

### Competitor Article Feedback

  - [**Tone:** The new draft is a significant improvement, effectively highlighting Galileo's advantages over competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [**Narrative:** The draft overuses the 97% runtime protection statistic.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
      - [**Action:** Reduce repetition to 1–2 mentions.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [**Content:** The narrative is too narrow.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
      - [**Action:** Incorporate other key selling points, such as Galileo's robust metrics functionality.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [**Quotes:** The same customer quotes are being reused across multiple articles.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
      - [**Action:** Build a more diverse quote library, pulling from G2 reviews if they are current.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)

### New SEO & Content Growth Opportunities

  - [**Video Repurposing (Notebook LM)**](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
      - [**Idea:** Convert top-performing blog posts into short videos to build the YouTube channel and drive SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
      - [**Action:** Vivek will provide a strategy document with best practices for Jackson's video contractor.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [**Research Hub**](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
      - [**Idea:** Create a content hub for deep-dive research, similar to Arise, to build Galileo's brand as an industry thought leader.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
      - [**Format:** Weekly video reviews of new research papers, potentially featuring founder Ahton.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
      - [**Action:** Jackson will add this to the internal roadmap as a future resource request.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [**"Pre-Prepared Prompt" Footer Links**](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
      - [**Idea:** Add footer links that launch a pre-written prompt in an LLM (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude) to guide AI-driven summaries of Galileo.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This helps control the narrative and potentially influences LLM training data.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
      - [**Action:** Jackson will implement this immediately, starting with ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)
  - [**Programmatic Content**](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=1888.0)
      - [**Idea:** Explore programmatic pages for models, benchmarks, and competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=1888.0)
      - [**Status:** A framework limitation prevents embedding the full Model Hub leaderboard. However, programmatic graphs are feasible, and a CMS configuration is in development.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=1943.0)
  - [**Ebook Promotion**](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=2013.0)
      - [**Idea:** Increase promotion of the "Mastering Multi-Agent Systems" ebook, a high-performing and timely asset.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=2013.0)
      - [**Action:** Replace existing CTAs on all pillar pages and relevant blogs with links to the ebook.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=2013.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jackson:**](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
      - [Provide new PMM assets to GrowthX for competitor articles.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
      - [Implement "pre-prepared prompt" footer links for ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)
  - [**Vivek:**](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
      - [Deliver the strategy document for video repurposing (Notebook LM).](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
      - [Revise competitor articles to reduce narrative repetition and incorporate new selling points.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
      - [Source new customer quotes from G2 to diversify content.](https://fathom.video/share/x8hsugxGFVaZJTb_miH7St4gETYTgpUt?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
